scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/main && concurrently -k -n renderer,electron -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w packages/renderer" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/renderer && npm run build -w packages/main
